yearly.analysisText: Analysis of the SPY seasonal pattern above shows that a Buy Date of Mar 15 and a Sell Date of Dec 7 has resulted in a geometric average return of +9.1% over the past 20 years. This seasonal timeframe has shown positive results in 17 of those 20 periods (85%), rated Excellent. The current presidential cycle is Year 2 (midterm year), which historically averages +0.9%.

Analysis of the IWM seasonal pattern above shows that a Buy Date of Mar 15 and a Sell Date of Dec 27 has resulted in a geometric average return of +9.0% over the past 20 years. This seasonal timeframe has shown positive results in 14 of those 20 periods (70%), rated Good. The current presidential cycle is Year 2 (midterm year), which historically averages -1.2%.
